race.comment: Open race but DARK SIMBA (5) can win it fresh. He's off a spell here and has been scratched a couple of times before this but the 1500m first-up looks ideal having contested some strong races last time in. The fresh run behind Taken at Caulfield first up last campaign is excellent form for this. YAM (1) ran a very good race first up at Bendigo when up on speed, battling on gamely for a narrow second. He should come on from that and gets every hope. DANTOOINE (2) got the job done at the Bool last time and is flying this time in. He'll be up on speed and hard to run down again. FINANCE SHOGUN (9) is fresh for this with winning claims on best figures. HARBOUR TOWN (14) won well enough on debut at Bendigo and can go on with it.
